checklist.alt-texts: All images have appropriate alt text
checklist.focus-management: Focus is properly managed and visible
checklist.color-contrast: Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
checklist.semantic-html: Proper semantic HTML structure is used
checklist.skip-links: Skip links are provided for main content
checklist.form-labels: All form inputs have associated labels
checklist.heading-structure: Heading hierarchy is logical and consistent
checklist.link-purpose: Link text clearly describes its purpose

improvements: Added ARIA labels to all interactive elements
Added skip links for better navigation
recommendations: Regular accessibility audits with automated tools
Training for content creators on accessibility best practices
